steps.title: Identify the key finding
steps.content:
The passage emphasizes that the study’s core conclusion is the negative effect of plant litter on seedling emergence.

The notes explicitly state this as the researchers’ main result, while other details (2001 timeframe, UK location, and definition of seedling emergence) are contextual background.

steps.title: Match the essential conclusion to the choice
steps.content:
Choice B distills the study’s main finding without redefining seedling emergence (which the audience already knows) or over-explaining the setting.

The other choices either include irrelevant details (e.g., the definition in C) or restate the context rather than the result.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
